languages.text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на ксеноса так, что если бы взгляды могли уничтожать — от того давно осталась бы лишь горстка маслянистого пепла. Он не произносит ни слова, с нечитаемым выражением лица сверля гемункула взглядом.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на ксеноса так, что если бы взгляды могли уничтожать — от того давно осталась бы лишь горстка маслянистого пепла. Он не произносит ни слова, с нечитаемым выражением лица сверля гемункула взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smoldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of stone as he drills his stare into the Haemonculus.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smoldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of stone as he drills his stare into the Haemonculus.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

{n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fixiert den Xenos mit einem Blick, der so tödlich ist, dass er die Kreatur in Rauch aufgehen ließe, wenn Blicke töten könnten. Er schweigt. Seine Gesicht gleicht einer Maske aus Stahl, während seine Augen den Haemonculus durchbohren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fixiert den Xenos mit einem Blick, der so tödlich ist, dass er die Kreatur in Rauch aufgehen ließe, wenn Blicke töten könnten. Er schweigt. Seine Gesicht gleicht einer Maske aus Stahl, während seine Augen den Haemonculus durchbohren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fixe le xénos de ses yeux remplis de haine. Si un regard pouvait tuer, la créature aurait déjà été foudroyée et il ne resterait à sa place qu'un monticule de suie graisseuse. Le manipulus garde le silence et son visage se fait impassible.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fixe le xénos de ses yeux remplis de haine. Si un regard pouvait tuer, la créature aurait déjà été foudroyée et il ne resterait à sa place qu'un monticule de suie graisseuse. Le manipulus garde le silence et son visage se fait impassible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn clava en el xenos una mirada asesina tan intensa que, si fuera posible, de la criatura no quedaría más que grasa humeante. Guarda silencio con rostro pétreo y se limita a atravesar al Hemónculo con la mirada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn clava en el xenos una mirada asesina tan intensa que, si fuera posible, de la criatura no quedaría más que grasa humeante. Guarda silencio con rostro pétreo y se limita a atravesar al Hemónculo con la mirada.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn zenoya o kadar ölümcül bir bakış atıyor ki mümkün olsa yaratıktan geriye bir tek için için yanan yağlı bir is yığını kalır. Gözleri Haimonkulus'u delip geçerken yüzünde çelikten bir maske varmış gibi sessizliğini koruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn zenoya o kadar ölümcül bir bakış atıyor ki mümkün olsa yaratıktan geriye bir tek için için yanan yağlı bir is yığını kalır. Gözleri Haimonkulus'u delip geçerken yüzünde çelikten bir maske varmış gibi sessizliğini koruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡用凌厉至极的目光死死盯着那个异形。如果眼神能杀人，那么这个怪物恐怕早已化作一滩油腻的焦灰。他沉默不语，面孔冷硬如铁，视线仿佛要刺穿血伶人。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡用凌厉至极的目光死死盯着那个异形。如果眼神能杀人，那么这个怪物恐怕早已化作一滩油腻的焦灰。他沉默不语，面孔冷硬如铁，视线仿佛要刺穿血伶人。{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、もしそのようなことが可能であったなら、その生き物にはくすぶる脂じみた煤の山のほかには何も残らぬであろうほど、致死的な眼差しで異種族を射すくめる。彼は沈黙を保ち、その顔は鋼の仮面と化し、両の目はハエモンクルスを刺し貫く。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは、もしそのようなことが可能であったなら、その生き物にはくすぶる脂じみた煤の山のほかには何も残らぬであろうほど、致死的な眼差しで異種族を射すくめる。彼は沈黙を保ち、その顔は鋼の仮面と化し、両の目はハエモンクルスを刺し貫く。{/n}
